data.description: MICROSOFT'S STOCK FALLS 22% THIS YEAR DUE TO FEARS ABOUT THE IRAN WAR AND A DISAPPOINTING AI MARKET.

data.title: Priovant Expands Brepocitinib Development Program with New Phase 2b/3 Trial in Lichen Planopilaris (LPP)
data.description: Durham-based company Priovant has revealed plans for a new Phase 2b/3 clinical program for the drug brepocitinib, intended to address lichen planopilaris (LPP), a severe inflammatory scalp condition impacting around 100,000 adults in the US. LPP causes inflammation in the critical stem cell-rich bulge area of the hair follicle, leading to irreversible hair loss and scarring. This condition also brings about distressing symptoms like pain, burning, itching, and scaling, and increases the likelihood of developing other autoimmune disorders and skin cancers. Currently, there are no FDA-approved treatments available for LPP.

data.title: Futu Announces Cash Dividend
data.description: In Hong Kong on April 02, 2026, Futu Holdings Limited ("Futu"), a prominent tech-driven online brokerage and wealth management platform listed on Nasdaq under the symbol FUTU, declared a cash dividend of US$0.325 per ordinary share or US$2.6 per American Depositary Share ("ADS"). The dividend will be disbursed in U.S. dollars to shareholders and ADS holders of record by April 16, 2026. The total amount allocated for this dividend stands at around US$365 million. Shareholders and ADS holders can anticipate the payment, facilitated by the depositary bank as per the deposit agreement terms, on or about April 29, 2026.

data.title: Immunovant Announces Phase 3 Study Results for Batoclimab in Thyroid Eye Disease (TED)
data.description: Immunovant, Inc., headquartered in Durham, North Carolina, announced the release of key findings on April 2, 2026. The clinical-stage immunology company, listed on Nasdaq as IMVT, disclosed outcomes from two Phase 3 studies called GO. These trials focused on assessing the effectiveness of batoclimab in treating adult patients grappling with active, moderate-to-severe cases of thyroid eye disease (TED). Immunovant aims to enhance the quality of life for individuals battling autoimmune disorders.

data.title: Realta Fusion and Commonwealth Fusion Systems Form Strategic Partnership to Commercialize Magnetic Mirror Fusion Energy
data.description: Realta is set to benefit from a strategic partnership with CFS, which specializes in creating high-temperature superconducting magnets. This collaboration will speed up the commercialization of Realta's technology by providing access to CFS' expertise. The partnership, based in MADISON, Wis. and DEVENS, Mass., aims to leverage CFS' capabilities to enhance the efficiency and cost-effectiveness of manufacturing processes. This initiative is expected to significantly propel Realta's technology forward, ultimately leading to the successful introduction of their products to the market.

data.title: Folly Launches First Pill-Strength Hair Health Gummy
data.description: Introducing a groundbreaking solution to the supplement industry's problem of underdosing and inconsistency, a new product offers over 30 clinically proven ingredients with a dosage 16 times higher than the average hair gummy. Through biotech encapsulation technology, this innovation promises notable results within 30 days of use. Originating in London, the product aims to revolutionize the way supplements are formulated and consumed.

data.title: BagelFest West Rolls into Los Angeles Following Viral New York Success
data.description: Celebrating culinary mastery, cultural narratives, and entertainment suitable for all ages, BagelFest is bringing a fresh perspective to the beloved bagel. The event, set to take place in Los Angeles on April 2, 2026, showcases a unique blend of flavors and experiences. With an overwhelming response in New York, where all tickets were snatched up, BagelFest, now presented by King Arthur Baking Company, is looking to replicate that success. This event offers a new take on bagel-centric festivities, promising an exciting and inclusive experience for attendees.

data.title: Fetch Unveils Comprehensive Rebrand, Creating Multifamily's First Centralized Community Services Platform
data.description: In an effort to streamline services, a rebranding initiative has brought together package management, valet trash, storage, and market delivery under one unified ecosystem. Targeted mainly at multifamily and student housing operators and residents, this innovative approach aims to simplify processes and enhance convenience. The transformation was unveiled in AUSTIN, Texas on April 2, 2026. Fetch, recognized as a top provider in the multifamily sector, reflects the shift towards a more integrated and efficient solution for various housing needs.

data.title: SpaceX files for IPO, eyeing vast debut. Valued over $1.75 trillion, could be one of largest US public firms.
data.description: SpaceX's valuation exceeding $1.75 trillion would position the company as one of the largest publicly traded firms in the US, surpassing numerous prominent tech companies based on their current market values.

data.title: MightyCall Named to Inc.'s 2026 List of the Fastest-Growing Private Companies in the Pacific
data.description: On April 2, 2026, in San Francisco, MightyCall (CallCurrent Inc.) secured the 19th spot on the prestigious Inc. Regionals: Pacific list. This list showcases the fastest-growing companies in the region, with companies boasting a median growth rate of 94%. The ranking is part of Inc.'s sixth annual compilation, highlighting the remarkable growth and success of businesses in the Pacific region.
